## Test Plan

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private hostnames, private IPs, logs, or local state are committed
- [ ] Agent-generated code was reviewed before merge
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or setup changed
